ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the state was established */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "chief_minister" TEXT /* Name of the current chief minister */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the constituency belongs to */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2009, 2014) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the constituency */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the constituency */,
  "registered_voters_date" TEXT /* Date when the registered voters data was last updated */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the constituency was established */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election held in the constituency */,
  "next_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled election */,
  "voter_turnout_2009" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage in the 2009 election */,
  "voter_turnout_2014" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage in the 2014 election */,
  "voter_turnout_2019" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage in the 2019 election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the demographic data belongs to */,
  "electors_2009" INTEGER /* Number of electors in 2009 */,
  "electors_2014" INTEGER /* Number of electors in 2014 */,
  "votes_polled_2009" INTEGER /* Number of votes polled in 2009 */,
  "votes_polled_2014" INTEGER /* Number of votes polled in 2014 */,
  "valid_votes_polled_2009" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes polled in 2009 */,
  "valid_votes_polled_2014" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes polled in 2014 */,
  "electors_2019" INTEGER /* Number of electors in 2019 */,
  "votes_polled_2019" INTEGER /* Number of votes polled in 2019 */,
  "valid_votes_polled_2019" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes polled in 2019 */,
  "age_group_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing age group distribution of voters */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing gender distribution of voters */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing education level distribution of voters */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing income level distribution of voters */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity distribution of voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_demographics_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the election result belongs to */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2009, 2014) */,
  "winning_party" TEXT /* Winning party in the election */,
  "winning_candidate" TEXT /* Winning candidate in the election */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the winning candidate */,
  "runner_up_party" TEXT /* Party of the runner-up candidate */,
  "runner_up_candidate" TEXT /* Name of the runner-up candidate */,
  "runner_up_votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the runner-up candidate */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory (difference in votes between the winner and the runner-up) */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration entry */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the voter registration belongs to */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "voter_id" TEXT /* ID of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of voter registration */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the voter */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the election official (e.g., Returning Officer, Polling Officer) */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the election official is assigned to */,
  "date_appointed" TEXT /* Date the official was appointed */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the official */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in election management */,
  "previous_positions" TEXT /* JSON object containing previous positions held by the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election data */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the election data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., demographic, results, turnout) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
